flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at West Texas A & M University rose 22% between 2006 and 2009 ($6.1k → $7.5k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at West Texas A & M University rose 21% between 2021 and 2024 (57.6% → 69.6%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at West Texas A & M University rose 21% between 2021 and 2024 (45.7% → 55.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at West Texas A & M University rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 (28.7% → 32.4%).
